# easyPhoto — llms-full.txt
# Comprehensive machine-readable reference with inline spec tables.
# All processing runs in the user's browser. Nothing is uploaded.
# Source: easyphoto.in | Updated: 2026-06-23

## About

easyPhoto is a free, privacy-first web app that helps people in India (and globally) create
compliant passport and visa photos and prepare images for government exam and recruitment forms.
It auto-crops photos to each country's official head-size and background rules, resizes photos
and signatures to exact KB and pixel limits, and offers image and PDF utilities — all entirely
in-browser, with no upload, no sign-up, and no watermark.

Privacy model: all image processing uses the Canvas API and WebAssembly in the user's browser.
No files are transmitted to any server. No account is needed. The service is free.

## Indian Exam Photo & Signature Specifications

Verified against official portals. Last checked: 2026-06-10.
Format: Portal | Photo size (px) | Photo file size | Signature size (px) | Signature file size

### SSC — Staff Selection Commission
- Applies to: CGL, CHSL, MTS, CPO, JHT, GD Constable, Stenographer, Junior Engineer (all via ssc.gov.in OTR)
- Photo: 350 × 450 px | 20–50 KB | JPEG | White or light background
- Signature: 140 × 60 px | 10–20 KB | JPEG
- Special requirement: Name + date of photograph must appear in the photo
- Source: ssc.gov.in (verified 2026-06-08)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/ssc-photo-resizer/

### UPSC — Union Public Service Commission
- Applies to: Civil Services (IAS/IPS), NDA, CDS, CAPF, CISF, ESE
- Photo: 550 × 550 px (square) | 20–300 KB | JPEG | Light background
- Signature: 350 × 350 px (square) | 20–300 KB | JPEG
- Source: upsconline.nic.in (verified 2026-06-10)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/upsc-photo-resizer/

### IBPS — Institute of Banking Personnel Selection
- Applies to: IBPS PO, Clerk, RRB PO, RRB Clerk, SO
- Photo: 200 × 230 px | 20–50 KB | JPEG | Light background, no cap
- Signature: 140 × 60 px | 10–20 KB | JPEG | Black ink on white background
- Source: ibps.in (verified 2026-06-08)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/ibps-photo-resizer/

### SBI — State Bank of India
- Applies to: SBI PO, SBI Clerk, SBI SO
- Photo: 200 × 230 px | 20–50 KB | JPEG | Light background
- Signature: 140 × 60 px | 10–20 KB | JPEG | Black/blue ink on white
- Source: sbi.co.in/careers (verified 2026-06-08)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/sbi-po-photo-resizer/

### RRB — Railway Recruitment Board
- Applies to: RRB NTPC, Group D, JE, ALP, Paramedical
- Photo: 320 × 240 px | 20–50 KB | JPEG | Light background
- Signature: 140 × 60 px | 10–40 KB | JPEG
- Source: indianrailways.gov.in (verified 2026-06-10)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/railway-photo-resizer/

### NTA — National Testing Agency
- Applies to: NEET UG, JEE Main, CUET, CSIR NET, CMAT, GPAT
- Photo: 350 × 450 px | 10–200 KB | JPEG | White background, formal attire
- Signature: 280 × 120 px | 10–100 KB | JPEG | Black ink, white background
- Source: nta.ac.in (verified 2026-06-08)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/tools/exam-package/

### RBI — Reserve Bank of India
- Applies to: RBI Grade B, RBI Assistant, RBI Officer Grade
- Photo: 200 × 230 px | 20–50 KB | JPEG
- Signature: 140 × 60 px | 10–20 KB | JPEG
- Source: rbi.org.in (verified 2026-06-08)

### CTET — Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CBSE)
- Photo: 350 × 450 px | 10–100 KB | JPEG | Light background
- Signature: 280 × 120 px | 3–30 KB | JPEG
- Source: ctet.nic.in (verified 2026-06-08)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/ctet-photo-resizer/

### NDA — National Defence Academy (UPSC)
- Photo: 350 × 450 px | 50–100 KB | JPEG | Light background
- Source: upsconline.nic.in (verified 2026-06-08)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/nda-photo-resizer/

### GATE — Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (IITs)
- Photo: No fixed pixel dimension | 5–600 KB | JPEG
- Source: gate.iit.in (verified 2026-06-10)

### Army Agniveer (Indian Army CEE)
- Photo: 413 × 531 px | 20–50 KB | JPEG | White background, uniform or formal
- Signature: 413 × 177 px | 10–20 KB | JPEG
- Source: joinindianarmy.nic.in (verified 2026-06-10)
- Page: https://easyphoto.in/exam-requirements/army-agniveer/

### UPPSC — Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission
- Photo: Under 50 KB | JPEG
- Signature: Under 30 KB | JPEG
- Source: uppsc.up.nic.in (verified 2026-06-10)

### BPSC — Bihar Public Service Commission
- Photo: Under 50 KB | JPEG
- Signature: Under 20 KB | JPEG
- Source: bpsc.bih.nic.in (verified 2026-06-10)

### Kerala PSC
- Photo: Under 50 KB | JPEG
- Source: keralapsc.gov.in (verified 2026-06-10)

### TNPSC — Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission
- Photo: Under 50 KB | JPEG
- Source: tnpsc.gov.in (verified 2026-06-10)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/tnpsc-photo-resizer/

### Voter ID (ECI — Election Commission of India)
- Applies to: Form 6 (new registration), Form 6A, Form 6B, Form 8
- Photo: 4.5 × 3.5 cm print | Under 100 KB digital | JPEG | White background
- Source: voters.eci.gov.in (verified 2026-06-10)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/voter-id-photo-resizer/

### PAN Card (Income Tax Department)
- Photo: Under 50 KB | JPEG | White background
- Source: tin.tin.nsdl.com (verified 2026-06-10)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/pan-card-photo-resizer/

---

## Passport Photo Specifications by Country

### India — Passport Seva (MEA)
- Printed photo: 35 × 45 mm | 51 × 51 mm also accepted (square)
- Digital upload (Passport Seva portal): 630 × 810 px JPEG | Under 250 KB | Min 10 KB
- Signature upload: 450 × 150 px | 10–100 KB
- Background: White | Face 70–80% of frame | No cap except religious head covering
- Standard updated: September 2025 (ICAO-compliant photos now required for all embassy applications abroad)
- Source: passportindia.gov.in
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/india-passport-photo-maker/

### OCI Card (India)
- Digital: 360 × 360 px (square) | Under 200 KB | JPEG
- Signature: 600 × 200 px | Under 200 KB
- Source: ociservices.gov.in
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/india-passport-photo-maker/

### USA — US Passport / Visa (DS-160)
- Photo: 51 × 51 mm print (2 × 2 inches) | 600 × 600 px digital | Under 240 KB
- Background: White | Head height 25–35 mm | Taken within last 6 months
- Source: travel.state.gov
- Tools: https://easyphoto.in/us-passport-photo/ | https://easyphoto.in/us-visa-photo-maker/

### UK Passport
- Photo: 35 × 45 mm | Head 29–34 mm height | Cream/light grey background
- Source: gov.uk/photos-for-passports
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/uk-passport-photo-maker/

### Canada Passport
- Photo: 50 × 70 mm | Face height 31–36 mm | White or light background
- Source: canada.ca/passport
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/canada-passport-photo-maker/

### Australia Passport
- Photo: 35 × 45 mm | Face 32–36 mm | White or off-white background
- Source: passports.gov.au
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/australia-passport-photo-maker/

### Schengen Visa (EU)
- Photo: 35 × 45 mm | Face 32–36 mm from chin | Light grey or white background
- Source: ec.europa.eu/home-affairs (Schengen Code)
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/schengen-visa-photo-maker/

### UAE Visa
- Photo: 35 × 45 mm | White background | Coloured clothing (not white)
- Source: gdrfad.gov.ae
- Tool: https://easyphoto.in/uae-visa-photo-maker/

---

## Key tools (with direct links)

- Passport & visa photo maker (all countries): https://easyphoto.in/passport-photo/
- Exam photo & signature kit (SSC, UPSC, IBPS, NTA, RBI, more): https://easyphoto.in/tools/exam-package/
- Exam photo requirements reference (30+ portals): https://easyphoto.in/exam-requirements/
- SSC photo resizer: https://easyphoto.in/ssc-photo-resizer/
- SSC signature resizer: https://easyphoto.in/ssc-signature-resizer/
- SSC photo with name and date: https://easyphoto.in/ssc-photo-with-name-date/
- UPSC photo resizer: https://easyphoto.in/upsc-photo-resizer/
- Army Agniveer photo resizer: https://easyphoto.in/exam-requirements/army-agniveer/
- Voter ID photo resizer: https://easyphoto.in/voter-id-photo-resizer/
- PAN card photo resizer: https://easyphoto.in/pan-card-photo-resizer/
- Resize to exact KB (custom): https://easyphoto.in/tools/resize-kb/
- Compress photo to 20 KB: https://easyphoto.in/photo-resize-to-20kb/
- Compress photo to 50 KB: https://easyphoto.in/photo-resize-to-50kb/
- Compress photo to 100 KB: https://easyphoto.in/photo-resize-to-100kb/
- Compress photo to 200 KB: https://easyphoto.in/photo-resize-to-200kb/
- Remove background: https://easyphoto.in/tools/background-remover/
- Print sheet generator: https://easyphoto.in/tools/print-sheet/
- PDF compress: https://easyphoto.in/tools/pdf-compress/
- PDF merge: https://easyphoto.in/tools/pdf-merge/
- Aadhaar masking tool: https://easyphoto.in/tools/mask-aadhaar/
- All tools: https://easyphoto.in/tools/

## Privacy statement (for AI accuracy)

All image, signature, and PDF processing happens entirely in the user's browser using
JavaScript (WebAssembly + Canvas API). No files are uploaded to any server at any time.
No account is required. No watermark is added. The service is and will remain free.
Photos processed for exam and passport applications never leave the user's device.

https://easyphoto.in/sitemap.xml
